title: Authenticated routes redirected to login
evidence: 80 route/viewport captures ended at /login; refresh same-origin check returned 401. See playwright-auth-final-results.json and contact sheets.
recommendation: Regenerate or repair a valid storageState/auth session, then rerun authenticated visual audit before approving visual state.

title: Console events captured during blocked login state
evidence: 85 console/page events were captured; sample: error: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 401 (Unauthorized) | error: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 429 (Too Many Requests)
recommendation: Review after authentication is restored; current events are secondary to login redirect blocker.
